# /test-plan

> Produce `test-plan/` for the feature. Integration suite categories: contract-test (HTTP/Service-Bus payload schema), idempotency, retry / DLQ, performance (target P95 latency / throughput), failover, security (auth / network), observability (correlation propagation).

## Usage

```
/test-plan [--feature <slug>] [--project <name>]
```

## Inputs

- `projects/{p}/integration/features/{f}/spec.md` (`SPEC_APPROVED` APPROVED)
- [templates/test-plan/index.template.md](../../templates/test-plan/index.template.md), [suite.template.md](../../templates/test-plan/suite.template.md)
- [constitution/12-observability-and-nfr.md § NFR targets](../../constitution/12-observability-and-nfr.md)

## Execution flow

1. Group FRs by integration pattern (event-driven vs batch vs claim-check vs etc.).
2. For each pattern, generate one suite with these test categories:
   - **Contract** — payload schema, header propagation, version negotiation
   - **Idempotency** — same `messageId` / `runId` processed twice → identical end state
   - **Retry + DLQ** — induce transient failures; confirm retry attempts; confirm DLQ on max attempts
   - **Performance** — load test up to NFR P95 latency / throughput
   - **Security** — auth flows; bad tokens rejected; secrets rotation drill
   - **Observability** — every log line carries correlationId
3. Inline self-check + doc_lint.
4. `currentStates += TEST_PLAN_DRAFT`.

## Output

- `projects/{p}/integration/features/{f}/test-plan/index.md`
- `projects/{p}/integration/features/{f}/test-plan/{suite}.suite.md`
